untranslatable_reason: Signal requires classification model probability outputs (predicted_probability >= 0.65, probability_margin >= 0.1) which are not available in the standard technical indicator set. The rule depends on machine learning model confidence metrics that cannot be expressed using only price-based indicators. The parameters 'probability_threshold' and 'minimum_margin' reference model outputs, not tradeable indicators.
translation_notes: This is a meta-rule about classification model confidence thresholds rather than a technical indicator-based trading signal. It describes how to filter signals from a separate prediction model, not how to generate signals from price data. Requires integration with external ML model outputs that fall outside the scope of technical indicator-based rules.
